name: tiny-todo
title: Tiny Todo
description: Create, browse, and complete tasks from a Tiny Todo API
author: kristianfreeman

commands.name: manage-tasks
commands.title: Task Inbox
commands.description: Review open and done tasks with owner and tag filters

commands.name: add-task
commands.title: Quick Add Task
commands.description: Create a task in Tiny Todo

commands.name: tasks-by-tag
commands.title: Tasks by Tag
commands.description: Lookup tasks using a specific tag

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Bearer token used for Tiny Todo API requests

preferences.name: defaultStatus
preferences.title: Default Inbox Status
preferences.description: Initial status filter when opening Task Inbox

preferences.name: defaultOwnerScope
preferences.title: Default Owner Scope
preferences.description: Choose whether Task Inbox starts with all, human, or agent tasks
